t_ch: 受影响的物品会漂浮…
t_en: All the affected items are floating around...

t_ch: 得想个办法把它固定住。
t_en: I need to hold them in place somehow.

t_ch: 比如…用胶水？
t_en: Maybe... with glue?

t_ch: 我们不该来这儿！
t_en: We really shouldn't be here!

t_ch: 这里其实很危险啊！
t_en: This place is actually quite dangerous!

t_ch: 修缮完成后想去哪里？
t_en: Where do you want to go once it's all fixed up?

t_ch: 「蓝调的时刻」吧。
t_en: Blue Hour, I guess.

t_ch: 客房的修缮方案…
t_en: About the restoration plan for the guest rooms...

t_ch: 看来还得再想想。
t_en: Let's take our time with that one.

t_ch: 我正在专注思考…
t_en: I'm trying to concentrate...

t_ch: 都别来打扰我。
t_en: Don't bother me right now.

t_ch: 必须经过细致计算…
t_en: I need to calculate this carefully...

t_ch: 要是有工具就好了。
t_en: If only I had the right tools for the job.

t_ch: 还有希望恢复正常吗？
t_en: Is there still hope for things to go back to normal?

t_ch: 怕不是个大工程。
t_en: It'll be a massive undertaking.

t_ch: 怎么回事、怎么回事！你倒是给我吐钱啊！
t_en: Hey! What's happening! Spit out the money!

t_ch: 系统维护中，请稍后……
t_en: The system is under maintenance... Please wait...

t_ch: 维护？什么时候维护不好，偏偏赶在这个时候！
t_en: Maintenance? Now? Of all the time!?

t_ch: 系统维护中，请稍后……
t_en: The system is under maintenance... Please wait...

t_ch: 稍后稍后、就知道稍后，你就不能给点别的反应？！
t_en: And it's always "please wait"! Can't you say something else!?

t_ch: …别的反应。
t_en: ...Something else.

t_ch: 唉，投资又失败了。现在的钱怎么这么难赚……
t_en: Ugh... my investments busted again... Making money is so hard these days...

t_ch: 再这样下去…我还不如去拆喷钞机呢，这个好歹实打实地来钱快。
t_en: At this rate... I might as well break Cash-Spewers! At least this earns cash quickly.

t_ch: 考虑到你之前展现出来的风险评估能力，我合理建议你放弃这个打算。
t_en: Considering the level of risk assessment skills you've shone so far, I'd reasonably advise against that idea.

t_ch: …匹诺康尼，说好的能实现每个人的梦想呢？我只是想发点小财而已啊……
t_en: ...They promised us that everyone could fulfill our dreams in Penacony! I just want to make a small fortune...

t_ch: 晕车晕船晕飞行器就算了，怎么做梦都能晕啊……
t_en: Can't believe I'm getting motion sickness even in my dreams...

t_ch: 本来就连玩个全息游戏都坚持不过十分钟，好不容易来一趟匹诺…唔！
t_en: I can't play holographic games for more than ten minutes. I've made the effort to come to Pena... Ugh!

t_ch: 呕——咳咳、咳咳咳！
t_en: Gahhh... *cough*... *cough*...

t_ch: 这都在做梦了，怎么还有人吃零卡圣代啊？
t_en: We're in a dream now! Why would someone eat a zero-calorie sundae?

t_ch: 身材焦虑懂不懂？哪怕是在梦里，高热量的食物也会让人心里过意不去。
t_en: It's body image anxiety, you know? High-calorie food can make you feel anxious even in a dream.

t_ch: 焦虑？这玩意有什么可焦虑的？
t_en: Body image anxiety? What's there to be anxious about?

t_ch: 我就不该跟你一个皮皮西人聊这个…真让人火大！
t_en: I shouldn't waste my time talking about this with a Pepeshi... It's frustrating!

t_ch: …行了，别一天到晚惦记着打你那个破游戏了。再这样下去，看你用什么交房费。
t_en: ...Enough with obsessing over playing that silly video game. If you keep this up, you won't be able to afford the room.

t_ch: 唉…你说要是梦里也有宝箱该多好，我们随随便便开几个，不就发财了吗？
t_en: If only there were treasure chests in our dreams. Open some chests and we'll be rich, right?

t_ch: 宝箱？我看宝箱怪还差不多……
t_en: Treasure chests? Just don't get killed by chest mimics...

t_ch: 宝箱怪？在哪？还有这种好事？！
t_en: Mimics? Where are they? They're extremely rare!

t_ch: …您对球笼竞速感兴趣吗？
t_en: ...Are you interested in Spheroid Race?

t_ch: 近期的电影节、音乐会想不想了解一下？
t_en: Or perhaps you want to know about upcoming movie festivals and concerts?

t_ch: 或者您最近有理财投资的打算吗……
t_en: Or maybe you're looking for investment plans...?

t_ch: 请放心，我能为您提供的服务一定比那些硬邦邦、傻乎乎的广告牌好得多……
t_en: Trust me, I can provide better service than those stiff and stupid billboards...

t_ch: …不是，我在这儿挥手挥了有二十分钟了吧，怎么一辆愿意载我们的车都没有？
t_en: ...Seriously, I've been waving my hand here for about <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes. Why hasn't a single car stopped to offer us a ride?

t_ch: 准确来讲，您挥手的总时长为<unbreak>13</unbreak>分<unbreak>45</unbreak>秒，其间包括两次时长分别为1分<unbreak>23</unbreak>秒与3分<unbreak>58</unbreak>秒的中断……
t_en: To be more precise, you have been waving for <unbreak>13</unbreak> minutes and <unbreak>45</unbreak> seconds, including two interruptions of 1 minute and <unbreak>23</unbreak> seconds and 3 minutes and <unbreak>58</unbreak> seconds, respectively...

t_ch: …这是重点吗？
t_en: ...Is that even the point!?

t_ch: 抱歉…那么根据我的判断，上述事件发生的原因有<unbreak>86%</unbreak>概率是由于您的身高处于司机们的视野盲区内……
t_en: I apologize... Based on my assessment, there's an <unbreak>86%</unbreak> chance that no cars stopped because your height was in the blind spot of the drivers' vision...

t_ch: 你还是闭嘴吧！
t_en: Just shut up!

t_ch: 对我说话态度好点行不行？我是你上司，现在公司里只有我留着你的档案。
t_en: Can't you be a bit nicer? I'm your boss, and I'm the only one who has your profile in the IPC now.

t_ch: 你在家族待这么久，都忘了自己是公司的人吗？还帮他们去做什么社区服务？
t_en: Have you worked for The Family so long that you've forgotten you're an IPC employee? And now you're even doing "community service" for them?

t_ch: 呵，一开始说待十年，十年之后又十年…我当「家人」都当三十年了！
t_en: You promised me I'd come back after ten years... but now thirty years have passed, and I'm still stuck in The Family!

t_ch: 难道你做梦也要提醒我给公司卖命吗？
t_en: Are you trying to remind me to work for IPC, even in my dream?

t_ch: 一分信用点都没有了，明天就是退房截止日，又要回到现实了……
t_en: I've run out of credits... Tomorrow is the check-out day for my room, and I'll go back to reality...

t_ch: 哪怕能借个几百信用点也好，真不想离开梦境啊……
t_en: If only someone could lend me a few hundred credits... I really don't want to leave the Dreamscape...

t_ch: 回到现实的话，我不就又得靠拐杖走路了吗……
t_en: If I go back to reality, I'll have to walk on crutches again...

t_ch: 你都在这儿站了快十分钟了，到底过还是不过啊？
t_en: You've been standing here for almost <unbreak>10</unbreak> minutes. Are you crossing the road or not?

t_ch: 我…这不是车多吗，等我再观察观察……
t_en: Th—There's so much traffic here... Let me wait and see...

t_ch: 你说这么大的城市，怎么就连个红绿灯都没有，也太不安全了吧？
t_en: It's so unsafe. Such a big city, and yet not even a traffic light, don't you think?

t_ch: …且不说那些车会不会撞到你，就算真撞着了，你也不会真受伤啊！
t_en: ...Those cars won't bump into you! And even if they do, you won't really get hurt!

t_ch: 下面真的有许多车在飞诶，好壮观！
t_en: There are really so many cars flying down there. What a spectacle!

t_ch: 哼，有什么了不起的，不过是从现实里多带了点钱而已。
t_en: Hmph, what's the big deal? They just brought some extra money from reality.

t_ch: 要是我跟他们一样有钱，我保准比他们更神气！到时候我就开车带着你，飞遍匹诺康尼的天空！
t_en: If I have as much money as they do, I'd be even more awesome! I'd take you and fly around the entire Penacony!

t_ch: 唉，也就说说而已…为什么，为什么我现在还是个穷光蛋？！
t_en: Well... I'm just kidding... But seriously, why am I still poor even in my dream!?

t_ch: 肯定是那些有钱人把我发财的机会抢走了！对，一定是这样！
t_en: Those rich folks must have robbed my chance at getting rich! That's gotta be it!

t_ch: 看来即使在梦里，人也难免对不属于自己的财富分外眼红。
t_en: Even in dreams, it's like people are getting all jealous over wealth that is not theirs.

t_ch: 这水还挺清澈，看着就让人心情愉悦……
t_en: The water looks pretty clear. Just looking at it puts me in a good mood...

t_ch: 确实不错，我都想下去游一圈了。
t_en: Yeah, it looks nice. I want to go for a swim down there.

t_ch: 你能不能稍微有点素质…再说了，你会游泳吗？
t_en: Can you at least have some standards... and do you even know how to swim?

t_ch: 就你那小身板，连水面都挨不到。到时候溺水了可别指望我来捞你。
t_en: With that tiny body of yours, you won't even reach the surface. Don't expect me to rescue you if you drown.

t_ch: 你给我闭嘴！
t_en: Oh, shut up!

t_ch: 又是「再来一瓶」…这次活动的中奖率也太高了吧？
t_en: "One More Bottle"? Again?... The odds of winning are way too high.

t_ch: 还来啊？我都要喝吐了…你有这个运气不去转老虎机，干嘛非得和苏乐达过不去？
t_en: More!? Drinking this much SoulGlad is making me wanna puke... Why waste your luck on dumb SoulGlad when you could be rocking the slot machines?

t_ch: 二者对我而言并没有什么区别…不过，你还喝得下吗？
t_en: They are all the same to me... By the way, can you drink anymore?

t_ch: 喝不下也得喝啊，总不能浪费了吧，你又不能喝！
t_en: I gotta drink! Can't let it go to waste, right? Not like you can drink them!

t_ch: 唉，真没想到，竟然有一天喝免费的饮料也会这么痛苦……
t_en: Ugh, never thought getting free drinks would be so painful...

t_ch: 哪怕看了一千遍一万遍，我还是会为知更鸟的美貌折服。
t_en: No matter how many times I watch it, Robin's beauty still amazes me.

t_ch: 她的笑容，她的裙摆，她的翅膀，她的光环…简直是不朽的宝藏！
t_en: Her smile, her outfits, her wings, and that halo... It's such a treasure!

t_ch: 干脆把这张海报带回家吧。我要私藏这份美丽…不让其它任何人染指。
t_en: I'll just take this poster home... I'll keep her beauty all to myself... No one else should get their hands on it.

t_ch: 嘿…可恶，抠、抠不下来？啊啊啊啊！
t_en: Wh—What...? Drat, why can't I tear it down?... Arrrgh!

t_ch: 真是一片欣欣向荣的景象。看来这「奥帝购物中心」算是办起来了。
t_en: It's bustling here. Looks like Oti Mall is finally up and running.

t_ch: 回想起来，这里最开始可要荒凉多了。街道两边没有那么多高楼，灯也不总是能亮。
t_en: This place used to be so deserted. There weren't tall buildings lining the street, and the lights weren't always on.

t_ch: 这多亏了您领导有方，夫人。
t_en: It's all thanks to your leadership, Madam.

t_ch: 不，这要多亏了你，苜蓿草家的小伙子。还得是年轻人靠得住。
t_en: Well, it's all thanks to you, Alfalfa's boy. Young people are the reliable ones making things happen.

t_ch: 我早就不再年轻了…但我还是会为你们获得的成果感到惊喜。
t_en: I'm no longer young... but I'm still impressed by the results you've achieved.

t_ch: 客人请留步，这里是匹诺康尼电视台总部，工作时间不向外人开放。
t_en: Excuse me, esteemed guest, but this is the headquarters of Penacony TV Station and is off-limits to outsiders during working hours.

t_ch: 那什么时候下班呢？
t_en: What about outside working hours?

t_ch: 什么时候都不下班。我们是匹诺康尼的支柱，必须要源源不断地产出好消息才行。
t_en: All hours here are working hours. We are the backbone of Penacony, and we need to keep releasing good news.

t_ch: 我只是想逛逛。
t_en: I'm just browsing around.

t_ch: 那请你去奥帝购物中心逛吧，这里可不是寻找真相的地方。
t_en: Then please go do that at Oti Mall. This is not the place where you'll find the truth.

t_ch: 我听说梦里有很多人特意编造假身份骗人，名字啊、长相啊、甚至连种族和性别都……
t_en: I've heard that there are people who deceive others in the Dreamscape by deliberately using fake names, fake appearances, even faking their race and gender...

t_ch: 我这么相信你，你可不能骗我哦。
t_en: I've put my trust in you, so don't you lie to me.

t_ch: 那当然啦，虽然我们才认识不到一星期，但你已经是我最好的朋友啦。
t_en: Of course I won't. Even though we've only known each other for less than a week, you're already my best friend.

t_ch: 我怎么可能会骗你呢？
t_en: How could I ever lie to you?

t_ch: 谢谢你…你真好！
t_en: Thank you... You are so kind!

t_ch: 葛瑞迪影业有新片上映了，叫《噩梦之镜》，我们一起去看吧？
t_en: Grady Films has released a new movie called The Mirror of Nightmares. How about we go watch it together?

t_ch: …其实我早就想问了，你一个智械，究竟为什么会对这种垃圾恐怖片感兴趣啊？
t_en: ...Actually, I've been meaning to ask for a while now. Why would an Intellitron like you be interested in such cheesy horror movies?

t_ch: 你要听实话吗？
t_en: You want the truth?

t_ch: 不听实话我问你干嘛？
t_en: Why else would I ask?

t_ch: 好吧…实话就是，我感兴趣的其实并不是恐怖片，而是你每次看恐怖片时候的反应……
t_en: Well... the truth is, it's not really the horror movies I'm into. It's the way you react every time you watch one...

t_ch: 你这个*匹诺康尼文明用语*！
t_en: You little *Penacony civilized language*!

t_ch: 嘶…这墙怎么过不去？不是说后面有个隐藏车站吗？
t_en: Argh... Why can't I travel through this wall? Isn't there a secret station behind it?

t_ch: 连着试了这么多下，我的脑袋都快撞开花了……
t_en: I've bumped into it so many times that I've almost broken my head...

t_ch: 难道…我手上这份《匹诺康尼十大景点揭秘》是假的？
t_en: Could it be... this Top 10 Attractions in Penacony in my hands is fake?

t_ch: 可恶，被那个蓝毛给骗了！
t_en: Darnnit! That blue-haired weasel!

t_ch: 唉，麻雀，我的小麻雀…离开我以后你要幸福……
t_en: Oh, my dear Sparrow... I wish you a happy life after you leave...

t_ch: 可是我幸福不起来啊！为什么要这个时候提分手啊？呜呜呜……
t_en: But I just can't be happy! Why did you have to break up with me!? Boo-hoo...

t_ch: 明明我费心准备了这么多礼物…明明我的心意是那么真！
t_en: I went through so much trouble to prepare all these gifts... My love is so genuine!

t_ch: 麻雀，没了你我可怎么活啊！
t_en: Sparrow, how can I go on without you!

t_ch: 我实在是太平凡了！活了快三十年，连一件值得写在史书上的事都没做……
t_en: I'm just so ordinary! I've lived for almost thirty years, but I haven't done a single thing worth mentioning in history...

t_ch: 跟那些享誉星际的大人物相比，我算个啥啊我！
t_en: I'm nothing compared to those cosmic superstars!

t_ch: 看开点，兄弟，何必把目光放得那么宏大？
t_en: Look at the bright side, mate. Why do you have to think it that way?

t_ch: 光是能来到梦境，就已经证明了你的不平凡——真正的普通人既付不起房费，也不会收到邀请。
t_en: The fact that you're here in the Dreamscape proves you're extraordinary. Real ordinary people can't afford a room and won't get invited.

t_ch: 总有些人在现实就活得匆匆，到了梦里也急吼吼的，不知道为了什么……
t_en: There are always people who rush through life in reality and even in the Dreamscape. I wonder why...

t_ch: 现实酒店的房间按天收费。咱们有点积蓄，还能待一段时间…但那些穷游的家伙，就得分秒必争了。
t_en: Rooms in the hotel in reality are charged daily. We have some savings and can stay here for some time... but those poor travelers will have to seize every moment.

t_ch: 唉，有时候，就这么静静地看着水也挺好。让生活慢一点……
t_en: Well, sometimes it's just nice to sit back and watch the water... enjoying your life at a slow pace...

t_ch: 现实已经很累了，来到梦里不就是为了放松嘛。
t_en: Reality is exhausting. Coming to the Dreamscape is all about getting relaxed, right?

t_ch: 咦，怎么投不进币，刚还好好的……
t_en: Hey, why can't I insert coins? It was working just now...

t_ch: 小赌怡情，大赌伤身；及时收手，切勿沉迷。
t_en: A small gamble for leisure's sake, but don't risk more than you can take.

t_ch: 嘿，这游艺机…长这么大我还是头一回见！
t_en: Hey, this slot machine... I've never seen anything like this before!

t_ch: 哈哈，怪有意思的……
t_en: Haha, looks interesting...

t_ch: 哼…我偏要继续玩，难道你还能反抗不成？
t_en: Hmph... will you stop me if I insist on playing?

t_ch: 赌狗赌狗，赌到最后，一无所有。
t_en: Foolish bets will lead to empty pockets.

t_ch: 哎，这玩意怎么还骂人呐？！
t_en: Hey, why is this damned machine jinxing me!?

t_ch: 我抢到知更鸟的票了，真是千钧一发！
t_en: I got the tickets for Robin's concert! That was a close call!

t_ch: 真的？太酷了！你怎么做到的？
t_en: Really? Awesome! How did you get them?

t_ch: 有俩座位靠近厕所，一开始没人愿意占，我手快给抢到了。
t_en: There were two seats near the restroom that no one initially wanted, so I quickly grabbed them.

t_ch: 呃…先不吐槽梦里居然有厕所这回事，那地方视角能好吗？
t_en: Ummm... setting aside the oddity of having a restroom in a dream, can you actually see anything from that angle?

t_ch: 哎哟，有票看就不错了！要是这次没去上知更鸟的演唱会，之后有你后悔的。
t_en: Hey, you should be grateful we've even got tickets! You'll definitely regret it if you miss Robin's concert!

t_ch: 那好，我去准备看演出用的礼服。
t_en: Fine, I'll go prepare my outfit for the concert.

t_ch: 啊哈——夜安，你这怪人！
t_en: Ah-ha... good evening, weirdo!

t_ch: 此刻在你眼前有报纸一份，斑驳字迹潦草涂遍它全身；
t_en: A newspaper lies before you, scribbles abound. In its heart, bitterness, a desire profound.

t_ch: 世人只得见它披挂的时讯，你却偏摸索它跼蹐的灵魂；
t_en: The world knows it for its garments, its headlines bold, but you seek its essence, its stories untold.

t_ch: 那么，你可听闻，它心中无限苦闷——生为报纸非所愿，它只想做个蹩脚诗人！
t_en: Despite birth as a paper, its plea resonates true. Yearning to be a poet, terrible through and through!

t_ch: …我觉得城市的高空绿化还有进步的空间……
t_en: ...I think there's still room for improvement in the city's overhead greenery...

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: …在我看来，他们最好及时调整本地的落户政策，不然迟早要出问题……
t_en: ...In my opinion, they'd better adjust their local settlement policy in time, or there'll be problems sooner or later...

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: …鉴于美梦剧团近来频频遭袭，我认为家族有必要出台「梦境造物保护法」，你觉得呢……
t_en: ...Considering the recent attacks on the Sweet Dreams Troupe, I think The Family should introduce a protection act for the Dreamscape creations... What do you think?

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 别一直「汪」来「汪」去的，你到底是同意还是反对啊！
t_en: Don't just give me "woof"! Are you agreeing or disagreeing?

t_ch: 汪…呃，我是说——有没有可能，我只是一条狗？
t_en: Woof... Uh, I mean, is it possible that I'm just an ordinary dog?

t_ch: 它们都说我们两个酒瓶在一起挺奇怪的……
t_en: They all say it is weird for us two bottles to stay together...
...Huh?

t_ch: 原来我只觉得那些家伙多管闲事，但现在…和我在一起你真的开心吗？
t_en: I thought those people were just nosy, but now... are you really happy with me?

t_ch: 你不说我都忘了，公园那边冰淇淋杂耍表演就要开始了，我们快过去吧。
t_en: Oh, thank you for reminding me! I almost forgot the ice cream acrobatic show at the park is about to start. Let's go there.

t_ch: …我想了很久，要不我们还是分……
t_en: ...I've been thinking about this. Maybe we should just break...

t_ch: 嗯，我也喜欢海胆味的那支，看起来特别滑稽。
t_en: Yeah, I prefer the sea urchin flavor, too! It looks so funny!

t_ch: 你■■■到底有没有在听我说话啊！
t_en: Are you even ■■■■■■■ listening to me!?

t_ch: 好好好，看完表演我们再去影城转转。
t_en: Alright, alright, we'll visit the movie theme park after the show.

t_ch: 「我发现你今天有点怪，怪可爱」……
t_en: "You look a bit unusual today, unusually cute..."

t_ch: 嗯…通过词性变换造就承续与转折，从而实现「幽默」效果……
t_en: Hmmm... using word changes to create continuations and twists... and thus effects of "humor"...

t_ch: 「我知道你是什么血型——你是我的理想型」？
t_en: "I know your blood type... you're my ideal type"...

t_ch: 以相同语素为基础进行概念偷换…是个新思路，但是在不熟悉该语言的前提下，容易造成认知混乱……
t_en: Conceptual replacement based on the same morphemes... It's a new idea, but prone to cognitive dissonance when familiarity with that language is low...

t_ch: 噗嗤……
t_en: Pfft...

t_ch: 你笑什么，是我的分析有问题吗？果然，对我来说你们有机生命的情感表达方式还是太复杂了……
t_en: What are you laughing at? Is my analysis incorrect? Indeed, the way you organic beings express your emotions is much too complicated for me...

t_ch: 不不不，我觉得你已经充分掌握了这门艺术精髓，可以去实践一下了。
t_en: No, not at all. Actually, I think you've grasped the essence of this art well enough to practice it.

t_ch: 实践？是说让我去「开展一段邂逅」吗？
t_en: Practice? Do you mean I should have an encounter?

t_ch: 不，我是让你去说单口相声。
t_en: No, I'm asking you to do a comedy skit.

t_ch: 我想不通、想不通啊！
t_en: I can't figure it out! I just can't!

t_ch: 你冷静点…
t_en: Just calm down...

t_ch: 你说它一个美梦排排乐，劝我戒赌？是它有病、我有病、还是我俩都有病？！！
t_en: What the heck? This Dreamy Slots is urging me to quit gambling? Am I off my rocker, is it made, or are we both insane?
Uhh...

t_ch: 克、克劳迪娅小姐！啊啊啊——是活的克劳迪娅小姐！
t_en: C—Claudia! Oh my god! It's Miss Claudia in the flesh!

t_ch: 终于见到本人了！好耶！不枉咱们在这里蹲了足足一个礼拜……
t_en: Finally, in person! Yeah! Staying here for a week is paying off...

t_ch: 嘘！小点声！你这样把人吓跑了怎么办？
t_en: Shush! Keep your voice down! What if you scare her away?

t_ch: 呃…冷静…好、我冷静…冷静…呼，好多了……
t_en: Uh... yeah... I'll chill... Yeah... I'm much better now...

t_ch: 要说还是你靠谱啊，直面偶像竟然还能面不改色。走吧，咱们现在过去假装偶遇，趁机要个签名！
t_en: You're so awesome! You've managed to keep your cool while facing your idol. Let's just pretend to "accidentally" bump into her and maybe ask for an autograph!

t_ch: 等一会儿。
t_en: Hold on for a moment.

t_ch: …嗯？周围也没什么状况啊…你还在等什么？
t_en: ...Huh? What are you waiting for...? There's nothing around here.

t_ch: 我…我紧张不行吗！等我先做一下心理建设！
t_en: I... I'm getting nervous, okay? Let me calm down a bit first!

t_ch: …做了大半个月，都快完工了，结果突然跟我说什么「不够惊险」，关键他之前也没提过这个需求啊……
t_en: ...I've been working on it for a month. Now it's almost done, and he suddenly told me it's not "thrilling" enough... but he never mentioned that requirement before...

t_ch: 太过分了，那你怎么处理的？
t_en: That's tough. How did you handle it?

t_ch: 还能怎么处理，改呗，结果几天后我拿着设计稿去找他——就是之前给你看过那个——又被打回去了……
t_en: What else could I do? I made some changes and presented the new design to him a few days later — the one I showed you earlier — and I got rejected again...

t_ch: 为什么啊，那个不是挺好的吗？
t_en: Why? Wasn't it good enough?

t_ch: 因为不够浪漫。
t_en: Because it was not "romantic" enough.

t_ch: 什么玩意？
t_en: What the hell!?

t_ch: 是不是觉得离谱？更离谱的还在后面呢——这次我全方位多角度地确认了他的需求，又花了一个礼拜给出一版设计……
t_en: Ridiculous, right? Guess what happened next? I considered his requirements comprehensively and holistically and spent another week coming up with a new version...

t_ch: 是「蜘蛛小径花园」吗？那个我看了，感觉特别好！
t_en: It's the Spider Path Garden, right? That's an awesome design!

t_ch: 然后就又被打回去了。
t_en: And then it got rejected again.

t_ch: 哼…他看了半天，最后和我说，「要不咱们还是用第一版方案吧」。
t_en: Well... He hesitated for a long time and finally said... "Maybe let's just use the initial plan."

t_ch: 这都多少起袭击事件了，到底什么人啊，一天到晚就盯着「美梦剧团」祸害……
t_en: How many attacks have there been? Those culprits seem to target only the Sweet Dreams Troupe... Why?

t_ch: 真是！简直丧心病狂，竟然对那些可爱…咳！我是说，竟然如此肆无忌惮地破坏匹诺康尼的公共财产！
t_en: They're insane! They dare to harm those lovely... Ahem! I mean, they dare to vandalize the public property of Penacony! That's unacceptable!

t_ch: …最麻烦的是谣言已经在宾客之间传开了，多离谱的都有…要是再不赶紧处理掉那家伙，保不准要出什么大乱子。
t_en: ...The worst part is that super wild rumors have already spread among the guests... Things might escalate into a big mess if the culprit remains at large.

t_ch: 没错！只要那坏东西一天没落网，美梦剧团就一天免不了担惊受怕……
t_en: Exactly! The Sweet Dreams Troupe won't be free from fear until they catch the culprits...

t_ch: 哎你知道吗，就在刚才还有个「骰子」问我什么时候能抓到犯人呢。可怜的小东西，这些日子肯定吓坏了……
t_en: You know? Just earlier, a "die" asked me when we'll catch the culprit. Poor little thing must be scared these days...

t_ch: 我之前是不是提醒过你？！你说，我是不跟你强调好几回了……
t_en: Didn't I warn you before? I've told you several times...

t_ch: 就你什么都知道！要真那么大能耐，你怎么不提前把错漏给处理了啊，当什么事后大聪明。
t_en: You think you know everything!? If you're so capable, why didn't you just handle the problem beforehand? Yeah, easy to see it now, right?

t_ch: 你、你再说一……
t_en: Y—You dare say it again...

t_ch: 哼，没用的老东西，多大年纪了还不懂收敛脾气，活该没一次吵架赢得过我。
t_en: Tsk, you just can't control your temper, you old idiot. That's why you've never won an argument with me. You deserve it.

t_ch: 这次的项目又累又危险，还不知道什么时候能结束…唉，可真是个苦差事啊……
t_en: This project is exhausting and dangerous, and I've no idea when it'll be over... *sigh* A tough job, really...

t_ch: 算了，还是聊点开心的吧。修缮完成后你想去哪里？
t_en: Forget about it. Let's talk about something happy. Where do you want to go once it's all fixed up?

t_ch: 「蓝调的时刻」吧，看看能不能来一场浪漫的邂逅……
t_en: Blue Hour, I guess. Maybe I'll have a romantic encounter or something...

t_ch: 不错，确实该好好休息一下。我都想好了，等到完成手头的工作，我就回一趟老家，和未婚妻结……
t_en: Sounds great. It's about time to take a break. As for me, once this project is done, I'll go back to my hometown and get married....

t_ch: 等等等—别说了！你还想不想回去了？！
t_en: Wait, wait! Stop! NEVER say something like that!

t_ch: 我不想…消失…
t_en: I don't want... to disappear...

t_ch: 被打开的宝箱…就像被喝光的苏乐达瓶，只会从梦境里消失……
t_en: Just like an empty SoulGlad bottle... An opened chest will vanish from the Dreamscape...

t_ch: 我还有梦想，还有大好青春。真不想就这样结束啊……
t_en: I'm still young! I still have lots of time to live! I don't want to end it here...

t_ch: 如果有选择的话，我其实想做一只小猫……
t_en: If I was given a choice, I want to be a kitten...

t_ch: 欢迎您，贵客。
t_en: It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.

t_ch: 欢迎您，贵客。
t_en: It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.

t_ch: 这位小姐…
t_en: Miss...

t_ch: 我们是不是在哪里见过？
t_en: Have we met each other before?

t_ch: 通缉令上吧。
t_en: I think I've seen your face on a wanted poster.

t_ch: 好慢啊…
t_en: What's taking so long...?

t_ch: 时间就是金钱。
t_en: Time is money.

t_ch: 应该快到我们了。
t_en: It should be our turn soon.

t_ch: 得想好该怎么说。
t_en: Gotta figure out what to say first.

t_ch: 咳，要是您方便的话…
t_en: Ahem, if it's okay with you...

t_ch: 不就是来问个好。
t_en: Aren't you here just to say hi?

t_ch: 至于紧张成这样吗？
t_en: Why are you such a nervous wreck?

t_ch: 你来这是做什么的？
t_en: What brings you here today?

t_ch: 我来找家族借钱的。
t_en: I'm applying for a loan from The Family.

t_ch: 真巧，我也是来借钱的。
t_en: What a coincidence! I'm here for a loan too.

t_ch: 放在哪一格来着…
t_en: Which compartment did I put it...

t_ch: 来访的人好多。
t_en: It's so crowded here.

t_ch: 是不是该发个号。
t_en: Maybe they need to give us queue numbers.

t_ch: 我脑子里都记着。
t_en: I remember everything.

t_ch: 您看这事…
t_en: Do you think...

t_ch: 孩子，不要恐慌。
t_en: Don't panic, my child.

t_ch: 您好，请问有什么需要吗？
t_en: Hello, can I help you?

t_ch: 您有什么需要吗？
t_en: How can I help you?

t_ch: 随时为您服务。
t_en: I'm at your service anytime.

t_ch: 要是再高一点就好了…
t_en: If only I was taller...

t_ch: 你小心点…
t_en: Watch out...

t_ch: 所以我们究竟还要等多久啊？这都已经快两个小时了吧！
t_en: So just how much longer do we have to wait? It's almost been two hours!

t_ch: 应该快到我们了……
t_en: It must be our turn soon...

t_ch: 知不知道时间就是金钱啊！啊？如果按分钟来算，我现在至少已经损失了<unbreak>21864</unbreak>苜蓿币了……
t_en: Don't you know time is money!? Huh? If I'm calculating by the minute, I've already lost <unbreak>21,864</unbreak> Alfalfa credits...

t_ch: 嘶——我这破记性……
t_en: Tsk... Curse my terrible memory...

t_ch: 明明上周才重新整理过，现在又想不起来了。
t_en: I just went through and organized this again last week and it's already slipped my mind.

t_ch: 也不知道在梦里多吃脑花管不管用……
t_en: I don't even know if eating brains helps with memory in a dream...

t_ch: 谐乐大典在即，现在又出了这种事，您看……
t_en: The Charmony Festival is just round the corner and now something like this happens. Look...

t_ch: 孩子，不要恐慌，更不要让疑虑拖累了行义的脚步。
t_en: Child, do not panic. You must not allow your doubts to slow the footsteps of righteousness.

t_ch: 这些乱象终会被斧正。在此之前，我们应当保持对{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}道路的坚定。
t_en: This chaos will all be righted eventually. Until then, we must maintain our resolution to the path of the {RUBY_B#"Harmony"}Great One{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 怎么就不让进呢？
t_en: Why won't they let us in?

t_ch: 是不是里面出事了啊。
t_en: Is there something going on inside?

t_ch: 有瓜？在哪在哪？
t_en: Any gossip? What's the scoop?

t_ch: 吃瓜也算我一个。
t_en: A scoop? I want ice cream, too!

t_ch: 那边围了这么多人…
t_en: There are loads of people here!

t_ch: 我也去看看。
t_en: I'll check it out, too!

t_ch: 这里不错，适合歇息。
t_en: This is a good place for a rest.

t_ch: 老板，演员又罢工了！
t_en: Boss, the actors are striking again!

t_ch: 没事，合同还在这。
t_en: It's fine, I still have the contract.

t_ch: 带头的那个人找到了！
t_en: I found the one leading them!

t_ch: 他怎么说？
t_en: What did he say?

t_ch: 他说投靠了公司。
t_en: He said he's going to the IPC.

t_ch: 不仅会支付违约金。
t_en: Not only will they pay the penalty...

t_ch: 还要把影城买下来！
t_en: They want to buy the whole theme park!

t_ch: 抱歉，我们不提供相关服务…
t_en: Sorry, we do not offer those services...

t_ch: 我们要投诉！
t_en: We want to complain!

t_ch: 这才多久啊。
t_en: It's not even been that long.

t_ch: 你就累的走不动了。
t_en: You're already too tired to move?

t_ch: 还是躺在家里舒服…
t_en: Lying down at home is the best...

t_ch: 朋友！没听说过我吗？
t_en: Friend! Have you not heard of me?

t_ch: 我是公司派来的代表！
t_en: I am a representative sent by the IPC!

t_ch: 嘁，那我还是钟表匠呢。
t_en: Oh, then I am the Watchmaker.

t_ch: 您看，这份投资计划…
t_en: Look, this is the investment plan...

t_ch: 影城的人流量很大。
t_en: The theme park sees a lot of footfalls.

t_ch: 不会让您亏钱的。
t_en: There's no way you'll make a loss.

t_ch: 让我考虑考虑…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 好烦。我不知道。
t_en: So annoying. I don't know!

t_ch: 有事就去问左边那个。
t_en: If you have a problem go ask them on the left.

t_ch: 嘘。她最近经常失眠。
t_en: Shh. She's been having trouble sleeping lately.

t_ch: 家族总在给她派活。
t_en: The Family keeps giving her extra work.

t_ch: 希望能帮她分担点啊。
t_en: I hope I can help her take care of some of it.

t_ch: 是钟表小子的雕像！
t_en: It's the Clockie Statue!

t_ch: 我们去合个影吧。
t_en: Let's take a group picture!

t_ch: 是怎么变成这样的…
t_en: How did it end up like this...

t_ch: 这不是一般人能修好的吧？
t_en: This isn't an easy fix, is it?

t_ch: 我去，我手机掉了！
t_en: Oh no, I dropped my phone!

t_ch: 你看，我说什么来着。
t_en: See! What did I tell you?

t_ch: 没事，反正是在梦里…
t_en: It's fine, we're in a dream...

t_ch: 再入梦一次就回来了。
t_en: It'll be back the next time I enter.

t_ch: 影城有三个主题区域…
t_en: The theme park has three themed areas...

t_ch: 在这里可以随意拍照…
t_en: You can take as many pictures as you like here...

t_ch: 还可以和动漫人物握手~
t_en: You can even shake hands with cartoon characters~

t_ch: 又一个有趣的人类…
t_en: Another interesting human...

t_ch: 得用内置摄像记录下来。
t_en: I have to record this on my built-in camera.

t_ch: 前方有惊梦剧团活动…
t_en: There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...

t_ch: 请时刻注意人身安全。
t_en: Please be aware of your safety at all times.

t_ch: 前方有惊梦剧团活动…
t_en: There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...

t_ch: 请时刻注意人身安全。
t_en: Please be aware of your safety at all times.

t_ch: 怎么连您都来了…
t_en: Even you're here...?

t_ch: 我来视察一下情况。
t_en: I'm here to keep an eye on the situation.

t_ch: 很好，来个炫酷的姿势…
t_en: Nice, now do a cool pose...

t_ch: 这会是最棒的一条！
t_en: This is going to be the best one!

t_ch: 让我来补点光…
t_en: Let me give you some light...

t_ch: 你简直是全宇宙的明星！
t_en: You're a universal superstar!

t_ch: 要是有一位主角就好了…
t_en: If only we had a main character...

t_ch: 这里应该演一段对手戏。
t_en: We should act out a fight scene here.

t_ch: 紧张刺激的潜入戏码，
t_en: A tense and exciting espionage scene...

t_ch: 屏住呼吸，别被发现了。
t_en: Don't breathe, we don't want to get caught!

t_ch: 黑暗无所遁形！
t_en: Darkness cannot escape!

t_ch: 邪恶无处藏身！
t_en: Evil has nowhere to hide!

t_ch: 直视我，恶徒！
t_en: Face me, villain!

t_ch: …他是如此沉稳可靠、如此帅气逼人…一切敌人都将在他的利爪与獠牙面前不堪一击……
t_en: ...He's so calm and reliable, so strong and handsome... No enemy could stand against his sharp claws and ferocious fangs...

t_ch: …等等，你这到底是看上了个什么玩意？
t_en: ...Wait, what kind of nonsense has got you hooked this time?

t_ch: 不许你这么说他！他是完美的！
t_en: Don't speak about him like that! He is perfect!

t_ch: 行吧，所以你那位心上人究竟是…？
t_en: Fine, so this man you've fallen for is...?

t_ch: 当然是伟大的、迷人的哈努兄弟——的立牌！
t_en: Of course it is the great and mesmerizing Hanu's... character stand!

t_ch: 你这是什么反应？别忘了这可是梦里，一堆礼物盒都能说话，美梦排排乐为什么就不能爱上立牌？
t_en: What is that reaction? This is a dream you know! If a pile of presents can talk, then why can't a Dreamy Slots machine fall in love with a character stand?

t_ch: 啊…这就是有机生物特有的美吗…毛茸茸、软乎乎……
t_en: Ah... Is this the beauty unique to organic organisms... So fluffy and warm...

t_ch: 如果传说中的「伊德莉拉」也是这般模样，我一定至死不渝地信仰「纯美」……
t_en: If this is what the legendary "Idrila" is like, I would follow the Beauty to my death!

t_ch: …我说你，差不多得了啊。
t_en: ...I think that's enough from you.

t_ch: 这世界上真的有谁能拒绝毛茸茸吗！反正我不行！
t_en: Is there anyone in this world that can resist something fluffy like this? I know I can't!

t_ch: …说起这个，你到底什么时候才能让我摸摸你的绒球？它看起来手感真的……
t_en: ...Come to think of it, when are you going to let me touch your fluff ball? It looks so...

t_ch: 想都别想！
t_en: Don't even think about it!

t_ch: 下午好，怀特曼先生，我谨代表家族向您发出邀请——各位家人已决定向您敞开怀抱。
t_en: Good afternoon, Mr. Whiteman. As a representative of The Family, I would like to extend a sincere invitation to join us... Our members have decided to open their arms to you.

t_ch: 您是一位优秀的设计师，想必会与隐夜鸫的家人们有许多共同话题。另一方面，梦境里的琐事最近愈发增多，我们需要新的筑梦师来协助维护这场美梦。
t_en: You are an outstanding designer, I am sure that you would have much to discuss with the Nightingale Family members. What's more, there has been a rise in trifling affairs in the Dreamscape of late, and we require Dreamweavers to assist in maintaining this beautiful dream.

t_ch: 我想我没法拒绝，是吗？
t_en: I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?

t_ch: 您有权拒绝，不过那样我们会感到深深的遗憾。
t_en: You have the right to refuse, but we would be extremely regretful should that be your decision.

t_ch: 我需要先考虑一下。
t_en: I need to consider this offer first.

t_ch: 当然可以，我们会在这里等待您的答复。
t_en: Of course, I shall be here awaiting your answer.

t_ch: 所以，我们现在是那种关系了吗？
t_en: So... Are we buds now or what?

t_ch: 还不是时候，我希望能在一个更浪漫的场合听你说这句话。
t_en: Hmmm. Maybe not yet. Ask me later during a show or something.

t_ch: 不如等到《寻星顽童》重映的时候再说吧。在影院的散场灯光下，我想我会同意的。
t_en: How about we wait for the Urchin Starhunters to perform again and speak then? Maybe I'll think you're my friend when there's a bit more light and noise.

t_ch: 好…好。
t_en: Oh... Okay.

t_ch: 终于达成了，我们的夙愿…过了快半个琥珀纪，我们总算攒够了追梦的钱。
t_en: It's finally here, our long-held wish has come true... It's been half an Amber Era, but we finally saved enough to come and chase our dreams!

t_ch: 你也很欣慰吧，亲爱的？可惜凭我的寿命，怕是没法陪你再来一次了。
t_en: Are you happy too, my love? It's just a shame that with my old age, I may not be able to come here with you again.

t_ch: 至少这一次，我们要尽情游玩、不留遗憾……
t_en: At least this time, I will indulge to my heart's content and leave no regrets...

t_ch: 老者身边的智械始终一言不发。或许他不能理解这种忧伤，又或是他找不出适合安慰的话语、唯有沉默。
t_en: The Intellitron by the old lady's side remained silent through this whole exchange. Perhaps he cannot comprehend this kind of sorrow, or perhaps he cannot find the words to comfort her and has nothing but silence to offer.

t_ch: 咱们都等了多久了，他人呢？连个影子都没见着。
t_en: How long has it been, where is he? There's no sign of him anywhere!

t_ch: 嗯…可能他刚巧有什么事呢，要不再等等？
t_en: Hmm... Maybe he has something he needs to do, why don't we wait a little longer?

t_ch: 等等等——就知道等！自从和他一起约看电影，我就再没见到过片头！
t_en: Wait, wait, wait... Is that all you ever say!? Ever since we started to go to movies with him, I've missed the opening credits every time!

t_ch: 你说我这样会不会被认出来？我好歹也算个小明星诶。
t_en: Do you think they'll recognize me like this? I am a bit of a minor celebrity, after all.

t_ch: 我认为与其担心被狗仔队偷拍，你不如多关注下宇宙毁灭的可能性——至少后者比前者概率高得多。
t_en: I think, rather than worrying about being snapped by the paparazzi, you should spend your time thinking about the destruction of the universe... At least that is actually likely!

t_ch: 什么？你知道要是没了我，匹诺康尼影视界会有多大的损失吗？！
t_en: What!? Do you know what would happen to the Penacony Visioscape if I weren't around!?

t_ch: 我明白，这大概就像高能物理学界失去了小亚当。
t_en: I do. It would be like if the high-energy physics world lost Little Adam.

t_ch: 谁是小亚当？
t_en: Who is Little Adam?

t_ch: 我在上个琥珀纪手搓出的一台计算机，在进行第六次四则运算后就卡死、崩溃了。
t_en: It's a computer that I built by hand in the last Amber Era. It crashed and fell apart after completing its sixth formula.

t_ch: 等了多久了…他人呢！
t_en: How long has it been, where is he?

t_ch: 就快到了吧…
t_en: He'll be here soon...

t_ch: 要不我们再等等？
t_en: Why don't we wait a little longer?

t_ch: 我们诚邀您加入家族。
t_en: We'd like to invite you to join The Family.

t_ch: 我想我没法拒绝，对吗？
t_en: I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?

t_ch: 所以，我们…
t_en: So, are we...?

t_ch: 嘘，还不是时候。
t_en: Shh, now is not the time!

t_ch: 等到《寻星顽童》重映吧。
t_en: Let's wait for the Urchin Starhunters to come back on.

t_ch: 我们的夙愿终于达成了…
t_en: We finally made it here...

t_ch: 你也很欣慰吧，亲爱的？
t_en: Are you happy too, my love?

t_ch: 我这样会不会被认出来？
t_en: Do you think they'll recognize me like this?

t_ch: 我相信狗仔队没那么闲。
t_en: I don't think the paparazzi are that bored...

t_ch: 我想我坠入爱河了…
t_en: I think I'm in love...

t_ch: …什么玩意？
t_en: ...What is that thing?

t_ch: 他怎么能这么可爱！
t_en: How could he be so cute!?

t_ch: 真是没救了…
t_en: You're hopeless...

t_ch: 这块有点老化了…
t_en: This one's a bit worn out...

t_ch: 找人来修修吧。
t_en: Better find someone to fix it.

t_ch: 是不是有点不对称…
t_en: Isn't it a bit uneven...

t_ch: 比赛都结束了谁关心这个？
t_en: Who cares? The competition's over.

t_ch: 这次比赛你押注了吗？
t_en: Did you place a bid on this competition?

t_ch: 再输下去，裤子都要赔光了。
t_en: If I keep losing, I'm gonna lose my pants too.

t_ch: 很久以前，热砂的时刻是一片危险的荒漠……
t_en: Long ago, the Moment of Scorchsand was a dangerous desert...

t_ch: 真的吗？太令人难以置信了！
t_en: Really? That's wild!

t_ch: 这次也没能…
t_en: Not this time either...

t_ch: 这次的盛会巨星肯定是她！
t_en: I bet she'll be the superstar of this contest!

t_ch: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！
t_en: Impossible. My idol's much better than her!

t_ch: 各位观众，这里是热砂的时刻，让我为您带来达乐苏盛会海选的现场报道…
t_en: Dear viewers, this is the Moment of Scorchsand. Let me bring you the official on-site details from the SoulGlad Festivity Auditions...

t_ch: 念错词了，是苏乐达！
t_en: Ah. Sorry. Mispronounced that one. SoulGlad!

t_ch: 欢迎来到热砂分会场！
t_en: Welcome to Scorchsand Hall!

t_ch: 你可真上照。
t_en: You're so photogenic.

t_ch: 拍完了我们来张合影。
t_en: Let's take a group photo together after this.

t_ch: 无法预测的比赛…太酷了。
t_en: An unpredictable competition... How cool!

t_ch: 我早说过那家伙能赢。
t_en: I told you that one was gonna win.

t_ch: 说好的保我进决赛…
t_en: You said you'd guarantee me a spot in the finals...

t_ch: 谁知道你这么不争气。
t_en: Who knew you'd be so terrible at it? I didn't.

t_ch: 小声点，别被人听见。
t_en: Keep it down, don't let the others hear you.

t_ch: 真是意犹未尽…
t_en: I want more...

t_ch: 这下绝对值回票价了。
t_en: The ticket's worth the price.

t_ch: 太闪耀了，我也要参加下届海选！
t_en: This is awesome, I want to participate in the next audition too!

t_ch: 简直是神之演技…
t_en: That acting performance's just divine...

t_ch: 据说冠军有喝不完的苏乐达。
t_en: They say the champion will have an endless supply of SoulGlad.

t_ch: 说得像你没参赛就喝得完一样…
t_en: As if you could finish your supply even without participating...

t_ch: 我想请那两位来演这部剧。
t_en: I'd like to cast those two in this series.

t_ch: 盛会巨星的出场费，恐怕…
t_en: I'm afraid the appearance fees for Festive Superstars are...

t_ch: 啧，这也能过关？
t_en: Tsk, that's all?

t_ch: 比我旗下的艺人差远了…
t_en: My artists are so much better...

t_ch: 可以看到，海选的反响非常热烈。
t_en: As you can see, the turnout for the auditions is very high.

t_ch: 大家仍留在现场，感受比赛的余韵。
t_en: Everyone still remains at the venue, enjoying the aftermath of the competition.

t_ch: 广告词呢？说词儿！
t_en: Where's the ad? Run it!

t_ch: 居然输给那种对手。
t_en: I can't believe I lost to that.

t_ch: 一定是我大意了。
t_en: I was careless.

t_ch: 红色的骑士真是可惜了。
t_en: What a shame for the Red Knight.

t_ch: 是啊，棋差一着。
t_en: Yeah, it was a close one.

t_ch: 高手间的胜负，往往就在那么一招之间。
t_en: The outcome of a contest between masters often is decided by inches and instants.

t_ch: 这届的对手也太厉害了。
t_en: The contestants this time are so strong.

t_ch: 我会追上他们的！
t_en: I'll catch up to them!

t_ch: 广告比海选内容还长…
t_en: The ads are longer than the auditions...

t_ch: 作为开赛前最大的黑马之一。
t_en: As one of the strongest contestants this time,

t_ch: 您有什么想对观众说的吗？
t_en: do you have anything you want to tell the audience?

t_ch: 那是个厉害的家伙。
t_en: He's really strong.

t_ch: 输给他，我心服口服。
t_en: I'm blown away by him. I concede.

t_ch: 有希米亚影业看上的选手吗？
t_en: Are there any contestants that Himemia Films is particularly fond of?

t_ch: 这属于商业机密…
t_en: That's a trade secret...

t_ch: 比赛已经结束，但盛会永不中止。
t_en: The competition may have been over, but the festivity will never end.

t_ch: 热砂大酒店半价折扣活动。
t_en: Scorchsand Grand Hotel half-off event.

t_ch: 你，值得拥有。
t_en: Because you're worth it.

t_ch: 都怪你们拖我后腿！
t_en: It's all your fault for holding me back!

t_ch: 显然不是我的问题。
t_en: I'm very evidently not the problem here.

t_ch: 我需要重新考虑我们的合作关系。
t_en: I need to reconsider our partnership.

t_ch: 比赛都结束了，你为什么还在鼓掌？
t_en: The competition is already over, why are you still applauding?

t_ch: 你不也没停吗？
t_en: You didn't stop either.

t_ch: 您印象最深的是哪一场比赛？
t_en: Which round was the most memorable for you?

t_ch: 当然是决赛，那场太帅了。
t_en: The finals, of course! That final round was epic!

t_ch: 我打算回去再看几遍录播。
t_en: I'm gonna go home and watch the VOD a few more times.

t_ch: 这机器是不是只会出三个一样的？
t_en: Does this machine only produce three of the same things?

t_ch: 五连中！您运气真好。
t_en: Five in a row! You're so lucky!

t_ch: 这就叫天选之人。
t_en: The Chosen One hath arisen.

t_ch: 我就打了个盹儿，怎么赛场都空了？
t_en: I just dozed off for a bit, why is the entire hall empty?

t_ch: 倒霉，他怎么偏偏在最后一轮输了。
t_en: Rotten luck, he lost in the finals.

t_ch: 你不会把工资也搭进去了吧？
t_en: You didn't put all your salary on the line, did you?

t_ch: 下面，有请本台的特别评论员。
t_en: Next up, our special commentator.

t_ch: 与往年相比，本届海选…
t_en: Compared to the previous years, this round of auditions...

t_ch: 苏乐达的赞助额也到达了历年来的最高点…
t_en: SoulGlad's sponsorship has reached a new height...

t_ch: 演出均已延期…
t_en: Performances are postponed...

t_ch: 非常抱歉！
t_en: Our sincerest apologies!

t_ch: 唉，我期待了这么久的演出居然没了。
t_en: *sigh* I can't believe the performance I've been looking forward to for so long is gone.

t_ch: 要我说啊，这背后一定有什么惊天大阴谋！
t_en: If you ask me, I'd say some deep conspiracy is afoot!

t_ch: 为什么突然要我来这里加班啊？
t_en: Why did they make me work overtime here on such short notice?

t_ch: 别多问，都是为了家族，年轻人要有奉献精神！
t_en: Don't ask, it's for The Family. Young people should practice the spirit of dedication!

t_ch: 这绝对是弄错了什么…
t_en: This must've been a mistake...

t_ch: 这才是他的本来面目。
t_en: These are his true colors.

t_ch: 万一是被诬陷的呢？
t_en: What if he was framed?

t_ch: 怎么还不能走啊，我还有演出呢。
t_en: Why can't we leave yet? I have a show to make happen.

t_ch: 别着急，猎犬正在盘查，还有三百四十个人就排到你了。
t_en: Don't worry, the Bloodhounds are on it. There are only three hundred and forty people until your turn.

t_ch: 快让我离开…
t_en: Let me leave...

t_ch: 调查结束前，任何人不得进出！
t_en: No one will be allowed in or out until the investigation is complete!

t_ch: 非常抱歉，剧院暂中止服务，请耐心等待。
t_en: My apologies. The theater has temporarily suspended its services, please have some patience.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼出大事了，今晚小心点吧！
t_en: Something big happened in Penacony. Be careful tonight!

t_ch: 真的假的，别吓我啊…
t_en: For real? Don't scare me...

t_ch: 再等等吧，快结束了。
t_en: Just wait, it's almost finished.

t_ch: 这算是带薪休假吗？
t_en: Would this count as a paid holiday?

t_ch: 都这样了，还不让退票…
t_en: Even in a situation like this, tickets are non-refundable...

t_ch: 你也是知更鸟的粉丝？
t_en: Are you also a Robin fan?

t_ch: 她的每句歌词我都能背下来。
t_en: I memorized every single line from her songs.

t_ch: 你说，我们鸢尾花里也有叛徒吗？
t_en: Say, does the Iris Family have traitors too?

t_ch: 谁说得清呢？
t_en: Who knows?

t_ch: 花名册…是该在这儿啊。
t_en: The Flora Codex... should be here...

t_ch: 是不是你记错了？
t_en: Did you misplace it?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的风向…
t_en: The winds of Penacony...

t_ch: 是时候叫橡木给苜蓿草让让位了。
t_en: It's time to ask the Oaks to cede to the Alfalfas.

t_ch: 宾客不要乱跑，乖乖等待接受调查。
t_en: Esteemed guests, please stay in place and wait for your turn.

t_ch: 叛徒的罪证就藏在大剧院中，一切蛛丝马迹都不能放过。
t_en: The evidence of the traitor's crimes is hidden in the Grand Theater. Don't overlook anything.

t_ch: 你好好想想，自己看到了什么？
t_en: Think carefully, what did you see?

t_ch: 我想不起来了，只感觉做了一个好长的梦…
t_en: I can't remember. It felt like I had a really long dream...

t_ch: 没想到家族中居然会有叛徒，真是可恶。
t_en: I didn't expect there would be a traitor within The Family. It's truly despicable.

t_ch: 背叛「同谐」之人，定会受到严厉的审判！
t_en: Those who betray the Harmony must be judged severely!

t_ch: 这次比赛你押注了吗？赛前最看好的谁啊？
t_en: Have you bet on this competition? Who're you rooting for?

t_ch: 别提了，输得一干二净，裤子都快赔光了。
t_en: Bah, drop it. I lost everything. Almost lost my pants too.

t_ch: 我这次运气不错，押的那个一脸主角相的球棒侠，明年的工资都赢回来了。
t_en: I got pretty lucky this time, bet on that baseballer with that protagonist vibe and won enough to make next year's salary.

t_ch: 等待会儿下班，咱哥俩一起去撮一顿，我请客！
t_en: When we're done with work, let's go get dinner! I'm buying!

s_en: Passerby who didn't watch the match
t_ch: 这次的盛会巨星肯定是她！这脸一看就是巨星！
t_en: I bet she'll be the Festive Superstar this time! She's got that superstar look!

t_ch: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！绝对是他。
t_en: Impossible. My idol's much better than her! It's gotta be him.

s_en: Passerby who didn't watch the match
t_ch: 盛会巨星可不是长得好看而已。
t_en: Being a festival superstar isn't just all about looks.

t_ch: 就你刚才直勾勾地盯着人照片那样，也好意思说我？
t_en: You're one to talk. You were gawking at her photo just now!

t_ch: 说好的保我进决赛，结果一上台就给刷下来了，还被那几个评委当众羞辱。
t_en: I was guaranteed to get through to the finals, but I was eliminated as soon as I got on the stage. I was even ridiculed by those judges.

t_ch: 本来想着在舞台上大显身手，给鸢尾花的星探留下个好印象，做不了盛会巨星，也能做个时尚明星。
t_en: I was gonna flaunt my talent on stage and leave a good impression on the Iris talent agent. I guess being a fashion star won't be that bad if I can't be a Festive Superstar.

t_ch: 这下全泡汤了，你今天必须得给我个解释不可！
t_en: It's all over! You owe me an explanation right now!

t_ch: 合同上写得很清楚，我们负责收集比赛信息，提供训练方案，具体名次由你的努力和实力决定。
t_en: It's all written in the agreement: We're responsible for collecting competition information and providing training solutions. Your hard work and talent determine how you're placed.

t_ch: 谁知道你这么不争气——考题都甩你脸上了，结果你看看自己演的都是什么，笑比哭还难看，就那么两句台词还能念错。
t_en: Who knew you'd be such a disappointment. The test was a freebie, but just look at your performance — your smile was worse than your weeping, and you even flubbed the only two lines you had.

t_ch: 我不管，我要退钱！
t_en: I don't care. I'm demanding a refund!

t_ch: 嘘，小声点，万一被人听见，传到主办方那里，咱们就惨了。
t_en: Shh, keep your voice down! Walls have ears, if this gets back to the organizers, we'd be screwed!

t_ch: 好多年没见过这么刺激的盛会海选了。
t_en: I haven't seen such an exciting Festivity Audition in years!

t_ch: 依我看，恐怕只有让「钟表匠」闻名的第一届海选，才能和今年的相媲美。
t_en: To me, only that first renowned audition that made the Watchmaker famous can compare to this year's!

t_ch: 是啊，真是意犹未尽，要是能抹除这份记忆再看一遍录像就好了。
t_en: Yeah, I can't get enough of it. If only I could forget everything and watch the recording again.

t_ch: 有幸能在现场看到这种比赛，这下绝对是值回票价了。
t_en: I was lucky enough to watch the competition live. It's definitely worth the price.

t_ch: 看他们过关斩将，我内心的热血也不禁燃烧起来了！
t_en: I can feel my blood burning up with passion just watching them clear the obstacles!

t_ch: 就让匹诺康尼见识见识我们二人的实力吧！
t_en: Let Penacony bear witness to the strength we wield together!

t_ch: 怎么还有我的事？等等，我好像猜到你接下来要说什么了。
t_en: Why am I still involved? Hang on, I think I can guess what you're about to say.

t_ch: 亲爱的，下届海选，咱们一起去…
t_en: Darling, let's go to the next audition together...

t_ch: 容我拒绝。
t_en: I refuse.

t_ch: 两个半道杀出的选手，居然一路打到了最后，真是出乎意料。
t_en: Isn't it crazy how those two participants, who seemed to come out of nowhere, ended up making it to the very end?

t_ch: 我们正在制作的那部太空喜剧，不是正愁找不到合适的主演吗？我看那两位就很合适，要不…
t_en: We're working on a space comedy, and we're having trouble finding suitable main leads. I think those two would be perfect. Why don't we...

t_ch: 你觉得，就咱们这种小作坊，雇得起盛会巨星？
t_en: You think a small studio like ours can afford a Festive Superstar?

t_ch: 这个…可以商量嘛。
t_en: This... can be discussed, right?

t_ch: 商量什么？用你一年的工资去补人家一个系统时的出场费？
t_en: What's there to discuss? You want to use your one year's worth of salary to make up for a system hour of their appearance fee?

t_ch: 姐你别说了，我要哭了。
t_en: Sis, let's drop it. I'm about to cry.

t_ch: 经历了那么多磨难，好不容易才走到决赛舞台，那位红色的骑士真是太可惜了…光是听他讲那些故事，都让我哭得稀里哗啦的。
t_en: After all the trials and tribulations to make it to the finals, it's a shame for the Red Knight... Just listening to his stories made me bawl.

t_ch: 我一开始也觉得他赢定了，可赶过去的那无名客也不是一般人，我甚至从他们身上看出了一股英雄惜英雄的色彩。
t_en: At first, I thought he was going to win for sure, but the Nameless who rushed over was no ordinary person. I even saw a tinge of heroism in them.

t_ch: 这场棋差一着的比赛，绝对会成为百年内盛会海选最经典的一幕。
t_en: What a close competition. People will be talking about this Festivity Audition moment for a century.

t_ch: 很有品嘛，高手间决胜于一招一式的对决，就是如此精彩。
t_en: Very classy — the difference between victory and defeat in a clash of titans lies in but a single move. That's what makes it thrilling.

t_ch: 好像听到有人在和我说话？
t_en: Did I hear someone speak to me?

t_ch: 每届都报名，每届都不过，好不容易自律起来，把每天的空闲都拿来练习，还碰上今年这种对手阵容。
t_en: I've signed up for every audition, and I've failed every audition. I've finally gotten some self-discipline to train during my spare time, but I just had to meet this year's lineup of opponents.

t_ch: 我还是老老实实回去，陪美梦剧团搬我的苏乐达好了。
t_en: I might as well return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe to lug my SoulGlad like a good lad.

t_ch: 别灰心，兄弟，你的努力我都看在眼里。比起试图依靠海选一夜成名的那些家伙，能每天专注一个事情的练习，你已经是生活的巨星了。
t_en: Don't fret, buddy. I can see that you're working hard. Compared to those who harbor daydreams of achieving stardom overnight, the fact that you're focused on practicing one thing every single day already makes you a superstar in everyday life.

t_ch: 看着吧，我会追上他们的，然后你就会知道，那些光鲜亮丽的人，和我们并没有什么不同。
t_en: Just watch, I'll catch up to them, and then you'll realize that those flashy, gorgeous characters are no different from us.

t_ch: 作为开赛前最大的黑马之一，却以迅雷不及掩耳之势，在第一场比赛就败给一位籍籍无名的新人。
t_en: For one of the biggest dark horses to lose to some unknown newcomer in the first audition, and by such a huge lead!

t_ch: 关于您在海选前发表的诸多豪言壮语，有什么想对观众和粉丝说的吗？
t_en: Regarding your impressive speech made before the audition, do you have anything to say to the audience and your fans?

t_ch: 那是一位踏星河而来的红色骑士，为人真诚，实力超群，绝对是选手中的极品。
t_en: That was a Red Knight who came through the ocean of stars, an earnest character with talents beyond most — a true luminary among the contenders.

t_ch: 输给他，我心服口服。
t_en: I'm blown away by him. I concede.

t_ch: 所以关于您在海选前发表的诸多豪言壮语，有什么想说的吗？
t_en: So, about your impressive speech before the audition, do you have anything you wish to say?

t_ch: 你这什么记者？专不专业啊？
t_en: What kind of reporter are you? The moonlighting kind?

t_ch: 业界认为，本次海选可谓是近年来最为热闹的一期，比赛过程中涌现出的诸多人才，更是让不少大公司都亲自下场。
t_en: The industry generally believes this to be the most exciting audition in recent years. Plenty of amazing contenders have surfaced during the competition, attracting the direct participation of numerous major companies.

t_ch: 作为匹诺康尼影视界的龙头大哥，本次海选中，是否也有让希米亚影业心动的选手？
t_en: As the leader of Penacony's film and television industry, have there been any participants who have caught Himemia Films' eye?

t_ch: 这个问题触及了我们的商业机密，我这样说，大家心里肯定也会有所定论。
t_en: This question encroaches on our trade secrets, but I think most can probably draw their own conclusions when I put it like this.

t_ch: 我们的新电影也将在近期上映，请大家多多支持。
t_en: Our new movie is going to be screened soon, and we hope everyone will support it.

t_ch: 都怪你们两个拖油瓶，连最基本的台词都接不住，如果我一个人上，盛会巨星还轮得到那些人？
t_en: You two are nothing but burdens. You couldn't even handle a couple of the most basic lines. Do you think anyone else would even have a shot at being the Festive Superstar if I were to take the stage alone?

t_ch: 记得我们最开始报名的是动作派表演吧？也不知道是谁，被美梦剧团的一条狗吓破了胆，直接丢下我们两个跑了。
t_en: I remember, we first signed up for the action performance part, right? I wonder who it was who got scared of some dog from the Sweet Dreams Troupe and left us both behind.

t_ch: 也不知道是谁拿的是恋人的台词，硬是念出了一股苜蓿草开会的味道——事情弄成现在这样，显然不是我的问题。
t_en: I don't know who it was who got the lover's lines and performed it like some Alfalfa Family meeting. It's obviously not my fault that all this has happened.
